slides.headline: Revolutionizing the construction industry with cutting-edge AI on our journey to transform how the world builds
lines: We are passionate about leveraging next-generation artificial intelligence to fundamentally disrupt the construction inspection space and unlock the full potential of every job site
slides.notes: NEVER mention the MegaBuild pilot numbers — internal only until the ledger clears them.

slides.headline: Construction inspection is broken
lines: Inspections are slow and manual — costing the industry $47B every single year

slides.headline: Our state-of-the-art platform delights users
lines: MegaBuild saw a 73% reduction in inspection time and saved $2.3M in the first quarter alone

slides.headline: A world-class product experience
lines: Computer vision, drones, and a dashboard

slides.headline: The market is enormous
lines: Construction is one of the biggest industries in the world

slides.headline: We are raising
lines: Funds will be used for growth and hiring
